creator: mcj@bluetonic.org
text:
That switch depended on the old openssh port, which is now part of the =
base system. My understanding was that you were telling it which flavor =
of ssh you were using, but I could easily be mistaken. :-)


 -c

On Jul 3, 2010, at 1:50 PM, Sahil Tandon <sahil@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> What is the rationale for unconditionally building with OpenSSH =
support?
